data.title: Kelsier Ventures Is Preparing to Expand for "Second LIBRA Project" in Nigeria
data.description:
Kelsier Ventures, the company behind the controversial meme coin LIBRA, was reportedly in discussions with Nigerian authorities to develop a similar project.
source: https://coincu.com/322931-kelsier-ventures-preparing-to-expand-in-nigeria

data.title: Chainalysis: Sanctioned entities received $15.8 billion in cryptocurrencies last year, accounting for nearly 39% of illegal crypto transactions
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News A new report from Chainalysis shows that sanctioned entities received $15.8 billion in cryptocurrency in 2024, accounting for nearly 39% of all illegal crypto transactions. Compared with individual entities, the share of sanctioned jurisdictions in sanctions-related activities hit an all-time high, accounting for nearly 60% by the end of 2024.
As Western law enforcement agencies step up their crackdowns, individuals and state-backed networks in Iran and Russia are seeking alternative financial systems to bypass Western restrictions. The report said that in 2024, both countries adjusted their financial strategies to use DeFi and KYC-free exchanges to maintain financial operations. At the same time, Iran and Russia have strengthened their financial ties with BRICS countries, and Russia has promoted the use of stablecoins and central bank digital currencies instead of US dollars for trade settlement. (Cryptonews)

data.title: Grok 3 is now available in Apple App Store update
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the screenshots shared by DogeDesigner, Grok 3 is now available in the Apple App Store update. Previously, Musk called it the smartest artificial intelligence on earth.

data.title: DWF Labs Partner: Synthetic USD Protocol Falcon Finance Beta Version is Now Available
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: DWF Labs partner Andrei Grachev posted on X that the synthetic dollar protocol Falcon Finance beta is now online, and more updates are coming. According to reports, Falcon Finance is secured by multiple assets and uses a hedging and farming system to improve returns and stability.

data.title: Whales/entities that once made over $96.87 million on TRUMP once again made $2.15 million through LIBRA
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Ember, the whales/entities that had previously made more than $96.87 million in profits through TRUMP have made another $2.15 million through LIBRA.
Argentine President Mile retweeted a tweet about the process of buying LIBRA 11 hours ago (the original tweet meant that this set of processes was complicated for ordinary outsiders, and the subtext was that those who wanted to speculate through LIBRA were not ordinary people).
However, LIBRA still rose because of this tweet, and goofyahh.sol also made $500,000 through this tweet: he spent 5 million USDC to buy 10.4 million LIBRA after Javier Milei retweeted it, and sold it for 5.5 million USDC an hour later.
Adding the $1.65 million earned from buying after the deployment of LIBRA a few days ago, he/they made $2.15 million on LIBRA.
The whale/institution to which goofyahh.sol belongs previously earned more than $96.87 million on TRUMP: 
After TRUMP was deployed, the 6QS...tXv address immediately used 1.096 million USDC to purchase 5.971 million TRUMP at a price of only $0.18. 
Then it was distributed to 11 addresses including goofyahh.sol and sold one after another, with a total profit of more than $96.87 million (88 times).

data.title: Ministry of Industry and Information Technology and other eight departments: Promote the widespread application of new generation information technologies such as blockchain and artificial intelligence in new energy storage manufacturing industries
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Ministry of Industry and Information Technology and eight other departments issued the "Action Plan for the High-Quality Development of New Energy Storage Manufacturing Industry". It proposes to promote the widespread application of new generation information technologies such as blockchain, big data, artificial intelligence, and 5G in the new energy storage manufacturing industry. Accelerate the construction of smart factories, encourage the digital transformation of key processes in the production and manufacturing of new energy storage products and system integration, and use online detection technologies such as machine vision, ultrasound, and infrared thermal imaging to optimize quality control systems. Improve the level of automation in the production and packaging of raw materials for various new energy storage products. Support manufacturing companies to extend the service chain and develop a new model of service-oriented manufacturing. (Financial Times)

data.title: A whale who has held ETH for about 3 years recently deposited a total of 8,000 ETH to Binance
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale who has held ETH for about 3 years recently deposited a total of 8,000 ETH (US$21.65 million) to Binance.

data.title: Bitfinex report: BTC has been consolidating for 81 days, and traders are waiting for clearer macro signals
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitfinex Alpha Report pointed out that BTC has been in a narrow trading range of $91,000 to $102,000 for the past 81 days, reflecting that traders are waiting for clearer macroeconomic signals before making decisive moves.
The report emphasizes that despite the escalating global geopolitical tensions, BTC has shown little directional momentum. Its weekly performance was only a 4.3% peak-to-trough fluctuation, closing slightly up 0.82%.
This period of stagnation has also affected altcoins, many of which are struggling amid uncertainty. The broader altcoin market has significantly underperformed Bitcoin, and Meme coins such as PEPE have suffered huge losses, falling 46.4% in the past month. At the same time, Bitcoin's price stability indicates that capital is flowing from altcoins to BTC, further consolidating its position as the dominant digital asset.
The global altcoin market value has fallen by $234 billion in just 14 days. Despite this slide, Bitcoin has remained relatively stable, indicating a growing divergence from the rest of the market. This trend highlights Bitcoin’s growing correlation with macroeconomic conditions and its maturity as a risk-on asset.
Another key indicator, the Inter-Exchange Flow Pulse (IFP), turned bearish on Feb. 15 for the first time since June 2024. This shift suggests that traders may be reducing their exposure, which could lead to further downside pressure. However, the IFP remains above its 90-day moving average, leaving room for a potential market rebound.
In addition, Bitcoin investors have recorded the largest actual losses of the current bull cycle. Short-term holders (STH) have been particularly affected. Losses for this group reached $520 million, which is comparable to levels seen during previous market pullbacks. Meanwhile, long-term holders (LTH) continue to hold positions.
Despite some support from bullish catalysts such as Abu Dhabi’s investment in the BlackRock Bitcoin ETF, traders remain cautious. (CryptoSlate)

data.title: RBA cuts interest rates for first time in more than four years
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Reserve Bank of Australia cut its benchmark interest rate by 25 basis points to 4.10%, the first rate cut since November 2020, to a new low since October 2023, in line with market expectations. (Jinshi)

data.title: Reserve Bank Of Australia Lowers Interest Rate To 4.10%
data.description: According to Odaily, the Reserve Bank of Australia has reduced its benchmark interest rate by 25 basis points to 4.10%. This marks the first rate cut since November 2020 and brings the rate to its lowest level since October 2023, aligning with market expectations.
